issues.detail: No realistic examples provided in the skill file.

scenarios.name: Build a SwiftUI editor screen presenting an item via a sheet
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses .sheet(item:) with the selected model, lets the sheet own dismiss() internally, avoids if let inside the sheet body, and uses @State with @Observable per the state-ownership table; baseline forwards onCancel/onConfirm closures and uses isPresented + if let.

scenarios.name: Implement a search screen with cancellation and debouncing
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses .task(id:) tied to the search input for restart/cancellation, models explicit loading/error states, and keeps the view small with explicit injection; baseline uses .onChange + manual Task management without .task(id:).
